posts.title: Temporary Restraining Order Granted Against Pulte Homes, What It Means for Lake Moor Residents
posts.author: Assured Law
posts.excerpt: On July 15, 2026, the Eighth Judicial District Court granted a Temporary Restraining Order against Pulte Homes and Western States Contracting. Here is what the order requires and what comes next.
posts.content:
## Court Grants Temporary Restraining Order, July 15, 2026

On July 15, 2026, District Court Judge Timothy C. Williams of the Eighth Judicial District Court, Clark County, Nevada, granted a Temporary Restraining Order against PN II, Inc. (Pulte Homes) and Western States Contracting, Inc. in the matter of Yakubik, et al. v. PN II, Inc., et al.

### What the Order Requires

The Order imposes three immediate restraints on Defendants:

1. **Dust control compliance.** Defendants must implement Best Available Control Measures. All construction activities must immediately cease when wind conditions cause fugitive dust emissions in excess of applicable opacity standards. No visible emissions of particulate matter may extend more than 100 feet or cross a property line.

2. **Authorized hours only.** No construction activity, equipment operation, servicing, delivery, or retrieval may occur outside the hours authorized by applicable permits and the Henderson Municipal Code.

3. **No heavy equipment on public streets.** Wheel loaders, excavators, and articulated haul trucks may not be operated, staged, loaded, or hauled on public streets adjacent to the Project except as authorized by applicable permits and approved traffic control plans.

### What Comes Next

A hearing for permanent injunction is set for 7/29/2026 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 16. At that hearing, Defendants must show cause why a permanent injunction should not issue.

### If You Live Near This Project

If you own a home near the Lake Moor development at Athens Avenue and Racetrack Road in Henderson and have experienced dust, property damage, or pool or HVAC contamination, contact Assured Law for a free case review.
